mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.homework_id, t1.student_id, t1.add_time, t1.content, t1.score, t1.comment, t1.comment_time, t1.images, t2.name as student_name, t3.name as comment_teacher_name FROM homework_record t1 LEFT JOIN student t2 ON t2.id = t1.student_id LEFT JOIN staff t3 ON t3.id = t1.comment_teacher WHERE t1.homework_id = #{query.homeworkId} ORDER BY t1.add_time DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.homework_id, t1.student_id, t1.add_time, t1.content, t1.score, t1.comment, t1.comment_time, t1.images, t2.name as student_name, t3.name as comment_teacher_name FROM homework_record t1 LEFT JOIN student t2 ON t2.id = t1.student_id LEFT JOIN staff t3 ON t3.id = t1.comment_teacher WHERE t1.homework_id = #{homeworkId} ORDER BY t1.add_time ASC
